specs.title: planner landing has no critical accessibility violations

reset layout restores defaults after a moved widget
keyboard nudge updates access placement
left rail collapse preserves icon shortcuts and expand action
furniture tool opens the library and placed item appears in recents
selecting a planner shape opens the inspector outside Review
view switching keeps chrome and renders a nonblank 3D scene
3D fallback keeps 2D planner usable when WebGL is unavailable
tool rail exposes every custom tool

Room tool supports dragging up and left

catalog item click activates furniture placement
Door tool places on an existing wall

Zone tool creates a zone shape
Review step defaults to Measure and measurement works
Select tool selects a placed shape
Pan tool activates without breaking the canvas
tool visibility dropdown filters the rail in step-focused mode
Erase tool removes a shape
planner landing exceeds generic benchmark proof points
